title: Alert Deduplication
description:
Each line is `timestamp\talert_name` (tab-separated). Deduplicate alerts of the same name within a 300-second window: keep only the first occurrence, reset the window after each kept alert.

Return the deduplicated lines sorted by timestamp ascending, in the same `timestamp\talert_name` format.
constraints: Input is a plain string passed to solve(input string) string
Return a string matching the expected output exactly
Return empty string where the problem specifies no results

examples.explanation: See test case: Dedup one HighCPU
